title: Murmur documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports murmur nature, family and medical history, symptoms, peripheral signs, abnormal ECG, and clinician-led echocardiography review.

source.title: Heart valve disease presenting in adults: investigation and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established heart valve disease, including adults with a cardiac murmur.
source.setting: Primary, secondary, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult murmur assessment, echocardiography, specialist referral, and valve-disease monitoring; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports murmur nature, family and medical history, symptoms, peripheral signs, abnormal ECG, and clinician-led echocardiography review.

assessment.text: Supports exertional syncope, severe angina or breathlessness, urgent specialist assessment, echocardiography, and referral after echocardiography.
